宿舎――大穴探索に挑む者たちにあてがわれた宿泊施設。<br>前線基地の憩いの空間:
The dormitory——lodging assigned to those who brave the Abyss. In
that space of respite within the forward base, three girls sat facing one another.
――というわけで、司令官の着任をお祝いする<br>サプライズパーティーを開きたい:
And so, I want to throw a surprise party
to celebrate the Commander's appointment!!
そうねぇ～♪<br>今さらっていう気もするけど、ま、いいんじゃな～い？:
Yeah~♪
It feels a bit late for that, but hey, why not~?
ウェンディの言葉に頷いたのは、ペルディオンの魔法使い姉妹。<br>氷の魔法使いヴ:
The ones who nodded at Wendy's words were the mage sisters of
Perdion—— the ice mage Veera, and her elder sister, the fire mage Verisa.
レアな鉱石を探す姉妹の案内人を務めて以来、<br>彼女たちはウェンディにとって心:
Ever since she served as their guide while they searched for rare
ores, the sisters had become some of the few friends Wendy truly felt at ease with.
あれ？ そういえば、わたしとお姉ちゃんの再会パーティーも<br>やってないよね？:
Huh? Come to think of it, we never had a reunion party
for me and Onee-chan either, did we? Maybe we should hold one...
そんなのいらない～～！<br>そこまで長く離れてたわけでもないでしょ～？:
We don't need that~~!
It's not like we were apart that long~?
姉とは桁違いに強力な氷の魔法を操るヴィーラだが、<br>ベリサのことは心から慕っ:
Though Veera wields ice magic leagues beyond her sister's power,
she adores Verisa from the bottom of her heart.
前線基地に来た当初は人見知りで落ち着きすぎていたが、最近は表情が豊かに<br>な:
When Veera first arrived, she was shy and reserved, but lately she's
livelier. Seeing that, Verisa tries to act the proper big sis.
デコボコながらも仲の良い姉妹のやり取りが、<br>ウェンディは大好きだった。:
Wendy loved watching the sisters' mismatched yet close-knit
exchanges.
まあ、お姉ちゃんとの再会パーティーは後日考えるとして……<br>司令官さまのお祝:
Well, the reunion party with Onee-chan can wait for another day... I
think the idea of making Commander-sama's celebration a surprise is wonderful.
司令官さまを普通のパーティーに招待しても、<br>理由をつけて断りそうですし……:
If we just invited Commander-sama to a normal party,
he'd probably come up with some excuse to decline... Hehe.
いっつもすました顔してるおにーさんが、どんな顔で喜ぶかぁ……。<br>ふふっ、こ:
I wonder what kind of face Onii-san will make, always acting so
composed... Hehe, this'll be a sight to see~♪ Nice idea, Wendy.
いえいえ。実は、サプライズは兵士さんたちのアイデアなんです。<br>やっぱり皆さ:
Oh no, not at all. The surprise was actually the soldiers' idea.
Everyone really does look up to the Commander...
わたしも負けてられません！ とりあえず、尊敬と感謝の気持ちを込めて、<br>パー:
I can't let them outdo me! So, to show my respect and gratitude, I'm
thinking the party should last three days and nights——no, a whole week straight!
基地の機能が止まっちゃう！！: The whole base would shut down!!
お、落ち着いてくださいウェンディさん。<br>司令官さまを尊敬する気持ちはわかま:
P-please calm down, Wendy-san.
We understand how much you respect Commander-sama, okay?
はい、とっても尊敬しています！<br>今の幸せな毎日も司令官のおかげなので、この:
Yes, I respect him so very much! My happy days are all thanks to the
Commander, so I have to repay him...!
ふーん……ウェンディの気持ちはよく分かったけどぉ……<br>どうして、あたしたち:
Hmm... I get how you feel and all, but...
why did you tell us about the party~?
あ……もしよかったら、おふたりにも……<br>手伝ってほしいなって……だめ、です:
Oh... if it's okay with you, I was hoping you two could...
help me out... is that... no good...?
司令官さまには、わたしたちも日頃お世話になってますから。<br>もちろん手伝わせ:
Commander-sama has always looked after us too.
Of course we'll help. Right, Onee-chan?
どっちかっていうと、あたしが世話を焼いてる方だけどね～♪<br>ま、いいよ。手伝:
If anything, I'm the one looking after him though~♪
Well, fine. I'll help you out——
と、言いたいところだけどぉ～。ふふっ。せっかく驚かせるなら、<br>パーティーな:
——is what I'd like to say, but~ hehe. If we're gonna surprise him
anyway, wouldn't a prank be way better than some party~?
ドッキリ……！？ なんですか、それ！？<br>司令官を楽しませられるなら、なんで:
A prank...!? What's that!?
If it'll make the Commander happy, I'll do anything! Tell me more!
いい覚悟じゃん♪<br>ならまずはアーデルハイトから、カメラってやつを借りてくる:
Now that's the spirit♪
First, go borrow a thing called a camera from Adelheid♪
カメラ……確か、目の前の光景を写し取れる機械、ですよね？<br>それでどんな場面:
A camera... that's the machine that captures the scene before you,
right? So what kind of scene should I photograph!?
ふふふ……それはねぇ～、おにーさんのなさけな～～い姿！<br>これを脅しに使って:
Hehehe... that would be~~ Onii-san's most pathetic~~ look! If we use
it as blackmail to make him our servant, he'll definitely be shocked♪
お、思ってたのと違いましたぁ～～！<br>わたしは司令官に『喜んで』欲しいんです:
Th-that's not what I had in mind at all~~!
I want the Commander to be 'happy'~~!
そうだよ、お姉ちゃん……。<br>それに、失敗する未来しか見えないと言うか、なん:
She's right, Onee-chan...
Besides, I can only see that ending in failure, how should I put it...
ええ～？ でも、ベリサちゃんはイタズラの方が好きだしぃ～～。: Ehh~? But Verisa-chan likes pranks way better~~.
お願いしますベリサさん！！<br>どうしても司令官に感謝の気持ちを伝えたいんです:
Please, Verisa-san!!
I absolutely have to show the Commander how grateful I am~!!!
ぐぅぅ！！ な、なんて純粋な目なのぉ……！？<br>思わず頷きたくなっちゃうから:
Ghhh!! Wh-what's with those pure eyes...!?
They make me want to say yes, so stop looking at me~!
お願いします～！ おふたりと一緒なら、<br>きっと素敵なパーティーにできると思:
Please~! If it's with you two,
I just know we can make it a wonderful party~!!!
う、うう……でもでもぉ……。<br>ただ喜ばせるだけっていうのは……なんか照れる:
U-ugh... but, but...
Just making someone happy is... kinda embarrassing, y'know...
お姉ちゃんったら。いいよって言ってあげたらいいのに。<br>本当は司令官さまのお:
Oh, Onee-chan. Just go ahead and say yes already.
You actually want to celebrate Commander-sama together, don't you?
そ、そんなわけないでしょっ！？<br>おにーさんに感謝とか、ちょ～～っとしてるか:
A-as if!?
I'm only like, a teensy~~ bit grateful to Onii-san, that's all!
はっ！ ということは！<br>ベリサさんなりに感謝はしてるということですよね！:
Ah-ha! So that means!
You are grateful in your own way, Verisa-san!
お願いします、どうかおふたりに協力して欲しいんです。<br>こんなことを頼めるの:
Please, I really need both of you to help. You're the only friends I
could ask something like this, Verisa-san and Veera-san...
……お姉ちゃん、こんなに言ってくれてるのに、<br>断っちゃっていいの？:
...Onee-chan, she's saying all this for us.
Are you really going to turn her down?
もう……仕方ないなぁ～。<br>ウェンディがそこまで言うなら、手伝うわよ。:
Jeez... can't be helped~.
If you're gonna go that far, Wendy, I'll help.
本当ですかっ！？<br>一緒にサプライズパーティー、してくれるんですねっ！:
Really!?
You'll throw the surprise party together with me!
まあサプライズで驚く顔も見たいし～？<br>おにーさんに恩を売って下僕にするって:
I mean, I do wanna see his surprised face~? Plus there's the route
where we put him in our debt and make him our servant~?
お姉ちゃんってば、素直じゃないんだから。<br>そんなところがまた素敵……ふふ…:
Onee-chan, you're so not honest with yourself.
But that's what makes you so wonderful... hehe... hehehehe...
おーい、戻ってこーーい。<br>ヴィーラも手伝うんだからねぇ～？:
Hey~~, come back to us~~.
You're helping too, Veera~?
こほんっ――失礼しました。<br>もちろん、３人で頑張りましょう。:
Ahem. Pardon me.
Of course, let's do our best, the three of us.
そうと決まったら、まずはマーケットまで買いものに行きましょうか。<br>サプライ:
Now that it's decided, shall we head to the market to shop first? If
we're throwing a surprise party, we'll definitely need some supplies.
やると決めたら手は抜かないわよ～。<br>それじゃ、それぞれ面白そうなものを買っ:
Once I commit to something, I don't slack off~.
Alright, let's each buy whatever looks fun and then meet back up!
前線基地内にある商店街。任務のための道具を求める探索者や、<br>せっせと客引き:
The forward base shopping district. Amid explorers seeking gear
and merchants hawking wares, the three girls could be found.
ふたりとも買いものは済んだ～？ じゃあまずはあたしから……。<br>ふっふっふっ:
You two done shopping~? Then let me go first...
Heh heh heh... feast your eyes on this——!
じゃじゃーん！ クラッカーを買って来たの！<br>パーティーと言ったら、やっぱり:
Ta-daa! I bought party crackers!
When you think of parties, it's gotta be these~♪
わわわっ！ す、すごい数……！<br>連続で鳴らせるのも、大砲みたいに大きいのも:
Wowow! Th-that's a ton of them...!
There's rapid-fire ones and even ones as big as cannons!
これだけ大きかったら、おにーさんも度肝を抜かれること間違いなし～！<br>くっく:
With ones this big, Onii-san's jaw will hit the floor for sure~!
Hehehe... I can't wait to see what kind of helpless face he makes~♪
笑顔にさせてくださいよぉ～！<br>あ、でも、賑やかな感じがしてうれしいかも……:
We're supposed to make him smile~! Ah, but they do give things a
festive feel... What do you think, Veera-san?
お姉ちゃんがくれたものなら、わたしはなんだってうれしいですよ。<br>クラッカー:
If it's something Onee-chan gave me, I'd be happy with anything. I'd
treasure these crackers and carry them every day, even take them into the bath.
火薬がしけるでしょー。<br>それより、ヴィーラは何を買ってきたのぉ？:
The gunpowder would get damp, you know.
Anyway, what did you buy, Veera?
えっと、これは……杖ですか？<br>こっちは赤い宝石の指輪、それから瓶に入った薬:
Um, is this... a staff?
And this is a ring with a red gem, and then medicine in a bottle...?
魔法の杖に、魔力を増幅させる指輪、それに魔力回復のポーション……？<br>品質は:
A magic staff, a ring that amplifies mana, and a mana recovery
potion...? The quality all looks great~. I'd almost want them for myself... hm?
ヴィーラ、あんた……もしかして、あたしのほしいものを選んできた？: Veera, you... did you pick out things I'd want?
お買いものをしていたら、ついお姉ちゃんの役に立つものを手に取ってて……<br>で:
While shopping, I kept picking up things for Onee-chan... But if it
makes Onee-chan happy, anyone would gladly accept them, right?
どういう理屈よぉ！？: What kind of logic is that!?
まったく……まあいいや。それはあたしが使うから。<br>で、ウェンディは何を買っ:
Honestly... well, whatever. I'll use them myself then.
So, what did you buy, Wendy~?
それが……兵士さんたちから司令官の好きそうなものを聞いて<br>メモしたんですけ:
Well... I asked the soldiers what the Commander might like
and wrote it all down, but I'm having a hard time finding any of it...
下調べをしてたのね。ふふっ、やるじゃ～ん♪<br>どれどれぇ。おにーさんが好きな:
You did some research, huh. Hehe, not bad~♪
Let's see here. What does Onii-san like, I wonder~~——
なにこれ！？ か、官能小説？ 裸婦画に……なっ！<br>あ、あんなものやこんなも:
What is this!? E-erotic novels? Nude paintings and... wha—!
E-even things like those and those...!?
あああ……ヴィーラが茹でダコになっちゃったぁ～～。<br>もう、なんてもの欲しが:
Ahhh... Veera's turned red as a lobster~~.
Jeez, what kind of stuff is Onii-san into!
わたしにはよく分かりませんが、きっと喜んでもらえるので、<br>買いに行ってきま:
I don't really understand what these are, but I'm sure he'll be happy!
I'll go buy them! First the novels——they'd be at the bookshop, right!
ちょっ、ちょっと待ちなさい！ ここに書いてあるのは、そ、その……！<br>男の人:
W-wait just a second! What's written here is, y-you know...!
It's stuff a guy uses to, um, comfort himself when he's lonely~!
寂しい時に役に立つって、とっても素敵ですねっ！<br>すみませ～～ん！ 官能小説:
Something helpful when you're lonely? That's really wonderful!
Excuse me~~! I'd like some erotic novels, please~~!
わーーーー！ <br>ストップストップ！ ダメだってばぁ～～！:
Waaaaaah!
Stop, stop! You can't do that~~!
パーティーと言ったら、美味しい食事が大切よね～。<br>この森なら、新鮮な食材が:
When it comes to a party, good food is essential~.
We should be able to find fresh ingredients in this forest.
うーん……おっ、見つけたわ！<br>このタケノコ、まるであたしに見つけられるため:
Hmm... oh, found one!
This bamboo shoot was practically growing here just for me to find~♪
ざぁ～こ、ざぁ～～こ♪<br>成長途中なのにあっさり見つかって食べられちゃう、ざ:
Helpless~, so helpless~~♪ Still growing but found and eaten so easily,
what a helpless little shoot~~♪
さすがです！ もうそんなにたくさん！: Impressive! You've already found so many!
ふっふ～ん、そうでしょ～？<br>あたしにかかればタケノコの１本や２本、簡単に…:
Heh heh~, right~?
For me, a bamboo shoot or two is a piece of——
ウェンディさん、すごいです！ もうこんなにたくさん！<br>キノコが山のようです:
Wendy-san, that's amazing! You've already got so many!
There's a whole mountain of mushrooms!
２時の方向、距離２０……１１時の方向、距離３２……。<br>あ、ヴィーラさんの隣:
Two o'clock, distance 20... eleven o'clock, distance 32...
Oh, there's one at the base of the tree next to Veera-san too!
本当だ……ウェンディさんの索敵能力はすごいですね。<br>あっという間にこんなに:
You're right... Wendy-san's detection abilities are incredible.
She gathered all of these in no time.
えへへ、そんなに褒められると照れちゃいます～♪<br>オートマタなので、こういう:
Ehehe, you're making me blush with all that praise~♪
Since I'm an automaton, I'm good at this kind of thing!
……ふ、ふーんだ。いいもん、別に……ていうか、あたしキノコより<br>タケノコ派:
...H-hmph. Whatever, I don't care... Besides, I prefer bamboo shoots
over mushrooms anyway... and most of humanity agrees with me...
あっ、そ、その――お、お姉ちゃんの採ったタケノコ、すごい色つやが<br>綺麗だな:
Oh, w-well——Onee-chan, the bamboo shoots you picked have such
beautiful color and luster~. The shape is really nice too, they're... artistic, right?
無理やりフォローするな～～！<br>そういう優しさが、１番胸に刺さるの～～！:
Don't force yourself to compliment me~~!
That kind of pity-kindness hurts the most~~!
だ、大丈夫ですよ、ベリサさん！<br>ほ、ほら、ベリサさんの方が少ないので、調理:
I-it's okay, Verisa-san!
L-look, since you have fewer, they'll be less work to cook!
――数日後<br>サプライズパーティーの準備は着々と進んでいた。:
——A few days later.
Preparations for the surprise party were steadily coming along.
採取した食材は保存してるし、小道具やプレゼントも用意したし……<br>よし、準備:
The ingredients we gathered are stored away, and the props and gifts
are ready... Alright, preparations are right on track!
はりきってるじゃん、ウェンディ。あたしたちが寝た後、夜中になっても<br>飾りを:
Someone's fired up, Wendy. You've been making decorations late into
the night even after we've gone to bed. You really want Onii-san to be happy, huh~.
うん。あんなに頑張ってる姿を見せられたら、<br>ウェンディさんのためにも絶対に:
Yeah. Seeing her work that hard, it makes me feel like we absolutely
have to make this succeed for Wendy-san's sake.
そうね……じゃ、なおさら倒れられても困るし、<br>釘は刺しておこっかな～っと。:
Right... well then, it'd be trouble if she collapsed on us,
so I should probably have a word with her~.
司令官、楽しんでくれるといいなぁ～。<br>ふふっ、素敵なパーティーになるように:
I hope the Commander enjoys it~.
Hehe, I'll work even harder to make it a wonderful party!
……頑張るのはいいんだけどさ、ウェンディ。<br>さすがに、ちょっとがんばり過ぎ:
...Working hard is fine and all, Wendy.
But don't you think you've been pushing yourself a bit too much~?
おにーさんも言ってたでしょ～？ いくらオートマタだって、<br>酷使すれば問題が:
Onii-san said it too, remember~? Even if you're an automaton,
overworking yourself could cause problems.
大丈夫ですよ！ わたし、風邪なんてひいたことありませんし！<br>それにそれに、:
I'm fine! I've never even caught a cold in my life! And besides, I
absolutely want the Commander to be happy at the party!
はいはい、分かった分かったぁ～。<br>ま、あとは当日の料理とか飾りつけくらいだ:
Yeah yeah, I get it, I get it~. Well, all that's left is the cooking and
decorations for the day, so I guess it's fine.
司令官さまにバレないようにしないとだから、<br>不在の時に飾りつけとか一気に進:
We have to make sure Commander-sama doesn't find out,
so we'll need to get all the decorating done while he's away.
きっと驚くわよ～。帰ってきたら、宿舎が豪華に<br>飾りつけられてるんだもん。ふ:
He'll be so surprised~. Coming back to find the dorm all lavishly
decorated. Hehe, I can't wait to show off my skills~♪
そうだ！ ここはみんなで、えいえいおーをやって、士気を上げましょう！<br>兵士:
Oh, I know! Let's all do a rally cry to boost morale!
The soldiers and I do it all the time!
いいですねっ。ほら、お姉ちゃんも。: That sounds great! Come on, Onee-chan, you too.
はいは～い。今日は特別に付き合ってあげる♪: Yeah yeah~. I'll play along just for today♪
それでは……絶対に成功させましょう！ えい、えい――！: Okay then... let's make this a success for sure! Fight, fight——!
